title: Volume & Storage
description: Mengelola penyimpanan data persistent menggunakan Docker volumes.

commands.name: docker volume create
commands.title: Membuat Volume
commands.description: Membuat named volume untuk menyimpan data secara persistent.
commands.examples:
docker volume create mydata
docker volume create --label project=web pgdata

# Menggunakan volume
docker run -d -v mydata:/app/data myapp
docker run -d -v pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres

commands.name: docker volume ls / inspect
commands.title: Melihat & Inspeksi Volume
commands.description: Menampilkan daftar volume dan detail informasi.
commands.syntax:
docker volume ls [opsi]
docker volume inspect <volume>
commands.examples:
docker volume ls
docker volume inspect mydata
docker volume ls --filter dangling=true
commands.notes: Dangling volume = volume yang tidak dipakai oleh container manapun.

commands.name: docker volume rm / prune
commands.title: Menghapus Volume
commands.syntax:
docker volume rm <volume>
docker volume prune
commands.examples:
docker volume rm mydata
docker volume prune
docker volume prune -f
commands.warning: Menghapus volume berarti menghapus SEMUA data di dalamnya secara permanen!

commands.name: Bind Mount vs Volume
commands.title: Bind Mount vs Named Volume
commands.description: Dua cara menyimpan data di Docker — bind mount (path host) vs named volume (managed Docker).
commands.syntax:
# Bind mount
-v /host/path:/container/path

# Named volume
-v volume_name:/container/path

# Sintaks --mount (lebih eksplisit)
--mount type=volume,source=vol,target=/app
commands.examples:
# Bind mount (development)
docker run -v $(pwd):/app -v /app/node_modules myapp

# Named volume (production)
docker run -v pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres

# Read-only
docker run -v ./config:/app/config:ro myapp

# tmpfs
docker run --tmpfs /app/temp myapp
commands.notes: Named volume lebih portabel dan dikelola Docker. Bind mount untuk development.
